meta.question: What external systems interface with the APS at the telescope level?
meta.finalAnswer: Based on the model data, the Alignment and Phasing System (APS) interfaces with several external systems at the telescope level. A primary interface identified is with the M1CS (Mirror 1 Control System), as evidenced by the existence of an "APS - M1CS Interface Control Document." Additionally, the model references interface points involving the M3 mirror and general TMT interface points in the context of alignment error budgets and analysis.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found several elements related to APS, including 'APS Mission' (block) and 'APS Operational Domain'. I will now map the properties of the 'APS Mission' block to understand its relationships and identify potential interfaces.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS Mission" .
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:block .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The previous query for 'APS Mission' properties returned no results, possibly due to case sensitivity or exact name matching. I will try to find the properties of the 'APS Mission' block using a case-insensitive search for the name.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(LCASE(?name) = "aps mission")
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "aps"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS Mission" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:block .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "alignment and phasing system"))
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "aps"))
  FILTER(?type IN (vocab:block, vocab:component, vocab:system%20component))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: I have identified several blocks related to APS, including 'M1CS - APS connection' and 'APS ICDs'. I will now explore the connections and dependencies of the 'APS' system to identify the external systems it interfaces with. I will focus on finding connectors or dependencies linked to the APS-related blocks.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?connector ?name ?end1 ?end2 WHERE {
  ?connector rdf:type vocab:connector .
  ?connector vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?connector vocab:Connector_end ?end1 .
  ?connector vocab:Connector_end ?end2 .
  ?end1 vocab:ConnectorEnd_role ?role1 .
  ?end2 vocab:ConnectorEnd_role ?role2 .
  ?role1 vocab:NamedElement_name ?name1 .
  ?role2 vocab:NamedElement_name ?name2 .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?name1), "aps") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?name2), "aps"))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?client ?supplier ?clientName ?supplierName WHERE {
  ?dep rdf:type vocab:dependency .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_client ?client .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_supplier ?supplier .
  ?client vocab:NamedElement_name ?clientName .
  ?supplier vocab:NamedElement_name ?supplierName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?clientName), "aps") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?supplierName), "aps"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "interface"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "aps"))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: The search for interfaces related to the APS system has identified several key documents and blocks, most notably the 'APS - M1CS Interface Control Document'. This indicates that the M1CS (Mirror 1 Control System) is a primary external system that interfaces with the APS. Other related interface points include M3 and general TMT interface points. I have sufficient information to answer the user's question.

request.answer: Based on the model data, the Alignment and Phasing System (APS) interfaces with several external systems at the telescope level. A primary interface identified is with the M1CS (Mirror 1 Control System), as evidenced by the existence of an "APS - M1CS Interface Control Document." Additionally, the model references interface points involving the M3 mirror and general TMT interface points in the context of alignment error budgets and analysis.
